summary: Successfully verified the routing fix for host redirection. Host registration and login now correctly redirect to /admin as expected. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% success rate.
passed_tests: Backend profile management and swipe functionality
Guest registration correctly redirects to landing page (not /admin)
Authenticated host redirect from /auth to /admin works
Unauthenticated user redirect from /admin to /auth works
Host checkbox functionality in registration form
Admin dashboard loads correctly with proper content
